jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Gradeup
jsonLd.description:
Gradeup invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Gradeup:
Gradeup is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup!
